finding_results.notes: Reworked the terms negotiation to separate idiolects under pressure: Elsie now stays constraint-first and logistics-driven, while Noreen pivots with socially agile humor/devotional texture. Added explicit self-correction in-turn ("Third... No, wait") and sharper leverage shifts to break symmetrical aphoristic cadence.

summary: Addressed the full dialogue/idiolect finding by revising the core terms exchange for stronger voice separation, interruption/self-correction texture, and less polished transcript-like symmetry while preserving chapter continuity beats and downstream code mechanics.
